name: 通用配置模板
description: 前后端通用配置文件模板

.env.example.content:
# 应用配置
NODE_ENV=development
PORT=3000

# 数据库
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/dbname

# JWT配置
JWT_SECRET=your-super-secret-jwt-key
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=1h

# CORS
CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000

# 日志
LOG_LEVEL=info

# Redis (可选)
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379

# 文件上传
UPLOAD_DIR=uploads
MAX_FILE_SIZE=10485760

docker-compose.dev.yml.content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=development
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/devdb
    volumes:
      - .:/app
      - /app/node_modules
    depends_on:
      - db

  db:
    image: postgres:15
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: devdb
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  redis:
    image: redis:7
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"

volumes:
  postgres_data:

Dockerfile.content:
# 多阶段构建
FROM node:18-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production

FROM node:18-alpine AS runtime

WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY . .

EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["npm", "start"]

.gitignore.content:
# 依赖
node_modules/
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.pyd
.Python
env/
venv/
.venv/

# 环境变量
.env
.env.local
.env.*.local

# 构建输出
dist/
build/
*.egg-info/

# 日志
*.log
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# 编辑器
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*~

# 操作系统
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# 测试
coverage/
.nyc_output/

# 数据库
*.sqlite
*.db

.github/workflows/ci.yml.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [18.x, 20.x]
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        cache: 'npm'
    
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm ci
    
    - name: Run linter
      run: npm run lint
    
    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test
    
    - name: Build
      run: npm run build

README.md.content:
# 项目名称

项目描述

## 技术栈

- 前端: Vue.js/React/Angular
- 后端: FastAPI/Node.js
- 数据库: PostgreSQL

## 快速开始

### 环境要求
- Node.js 18+
- Python 3.11+ (FastAPI)
- PostgreSQL 15+

### 安装

1. 克隆项目
   \`\`\`bash
   git clone <repository-url>
   cd <project-name>
   \`\`\`

2. 安装依赖
   \`\`\`bash
   # 前端
   cd frontend
   npm install

   # 后端
   cd ../backend
   npm install  # 或 pip install -r requirements.txt
   \`\`\`

3. 环境配置
   \`\`\`bash
   cp .env.example .env
   # 编辑.env文件
   \`\`\`

4. 启动开发环境
   \`\`\`bash
   # 使用Docker
   docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up

   # 或本地启动
   npm run dev
   \`\`\`

## 项目结构

\`\`\`
project-root/
├── frontend/          # 前端代码
├── backend/           # 后端代码
├── docs/             # 文档
└── .github/          # CI/CD配置
\`\`\`

## 开发规范

- 代码规范: ESLint + Prettier
- 提交规范: Conventional Commits
- 分支策略: Git Flow

## 贡献指南

1. Fork项目
2. 创建功能分支
3. 提交更改
4. 发起Pull Request
